name: Ive Group Limited
analysis: IGL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.7200. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.8400, stop A$2.3958, target A$4.1726 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
